description_long: This bird features a striking combination of black, white, and deep red plumage, with the red concentrated on its underparts and lower breast. Its wings are broad and outstretched, displaying a pattern of white spots and patches against a predominantly black background. The bird's head and upper back are solid black, while the tail is short and slightly rounded. Its beak is short and conical, suited for seed eating, and the legs and feet are black and robust, adapted for perching. The overall body is compact, with a smooth, matte feather texture and a lifelike, naturalistic appearance.
description: A compact bird with black, white, and red plumage, broad wings with white spots, and a short conical beak. Its underparts are red, and it has black legs and a rounded tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bird's outstretched wings, red underparts, and black head with the beak and feet visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the red breast, black back, and the layered structure of the wings and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full span of the wings with white spots and the solid black back and tail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the red underparts, black wings with white markings, and the bird's profile.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid black head and back, red underparts, white spots on black wings
